spec.query:
from(bucket: "cpms")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "flow")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["deviceId"] == "chwHeader" or r["deviceId"] == "cwHeader" )
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "deltaT" or r["_field"] == "cws")
  |> mean()
  |> pivot(rowKey: [], columnKey: ["_field", "deviceId"], valueColumn: "_value")
